name: Kingman Minerals Ltd.
summary: Kingman Minerals Ltd., an exploration stage company, sources and explores for mineral properties. The company explores for gold deposits. It has an option agreement to acquire 100% interest in the Mohave project that comprises 20 mineral claims located in Mohave County, Arizona; and the Cadillac East property located in Val d'Or, Province of Quebec. The company was formerly known as Astorius Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Kingman Minerals Ltd. in April 2020. Kingman Minerals Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
